children.name:
AssertionError: Кнопка 'Установить новый' не отображается
assert False
 +  where False = is_visible()
 +    where is_visible = <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://sprout-store.ru/settings/account/personal-limits'> selector="button:has-text('\u0423\u0441\u0442\u0430\u043d\u043e\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0439')">.is_visible
 +      where <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://sprout-store.ru/settings/account/personal-limits'> selector="button:has-text('\u0423\u0441\u0442\u0430\u043d\u043e\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0439')"> = locator("button:has-text('\u0423\u0441\u0442\u0430\u043d\u043e\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0439')")
 +        where locator = <Page url='https://sprout-store.ru/settings/account/personal-limits'>.locator
 +        and   "button:has-text('\u0423\u0441\u0442\u0430\u043d\u043e\u0432\u0438\u0442\u044c \u043d\u043e\u0432\u044b\u0439')" = <page_opjects.settings_page.personal_limits_settings_page.PersonalLimitsSettingsPage object at 0x7f1d0c23fcb0>.ADD_NEW_BUTTON
